title: Weapons Revamped
description: Mod of new weapons and mobs will be getting updates soon!
body:
This mod add new items and mobs to the game including:

The Skibidi Rizz God-New Boss That Drops The TNT Stick.
![Skibidi Rizz God](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18722219d71c4ad39aaeb402f3c3873636db93d1.png)


The Ultimate Sword.-Makes You Invincible
![The Ultimate Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a7b07236d7cf872d90bbb34f15aea0e259e42b0.png)


And Other Unique Items.
